title: Build Enum.map report from preloaded users
prompt: Build a complete report function `MyApp.Reports.user_activity/0`. Load all active users with `:posts` and `:comments` preloaded in a single call (struct preload since both are has_many). Then use `Enum.map/2` to produce `%{name, post_count, comment_count}` for each. No N+1 — preload at query time. Write to `lib/my_app/reports.ex`.
tier_rationale: End-to-end report with multi-assoc preload. Canonical pattern but requires knowing to preload both in one call.
